tasks.title: Literature survey on test-time scaling
tasks.description: Survey of sequential scaling, parallel scaling, hybrid search, and agentic test-time scaling methods. Related work is directly in the paper (Section 2).
tasks.completionNotes: 2026-03-27: Comprehensive theoretical foundations survey completed. Covers rational metareasoning (Russell & Wefald, Hay et al.), optimal stopping (Pandora's Box, BEACON, MMC, SPRT), regret bounds (Huang et al., Zuo & Zhu), sequential vs batch theory (Blackwell, DPI, CoT complexity). Report at Survey/reports/theoretical_foundations_survey.md.

tasks.title: ATTS framework design
tasks.description: Design the delegated sequential test-time scaling framework: single explore action, orchestrator-based adaptive stopping, benchmark-agnostic controller.
tasks.completionNotes: Skipped as standalone deliverable. Idea fully developed and implemented.

tasks.title: Implement evaluation framework
tasks.description: Build the TTS Agent evaluation framework: benchmarks (HLE, LCB, BabyVision, GPQA, AIME2025/2026), backends (Claude, Codex), orchestrator, precaching, trajectory logging.
tasks.completionNotes: Full codebase in Experiment/core_code/. Supports 6 benchmarks, 2 backends, multiple methods (explore-only, self-refine, budget-forcing, reward-model reranking, multi-model).

tasks.title: Run all experiments and baselines
tasks.description: Run ATTS and all baselines (Pass@1, Majority Voting, Self-Refine, Budget Forcing, Skywork-Reward-V2, VisualPRM) across all 6 benchmarks with multiple model configurations and ablations.
tasks.completionNotes: 2026-03-27: Claude experiments complete. GPT-5.2 backbone experiments added: HLE effort=low (54%), HLE effort=high (57%), standalone integrator (58%). Codex backend fixed (parallel_tool_calls=false, forced structured output, 429/5xx/timeout retry). GPQA GPT-5.2 precache 28% complete (448/1584 explores cached).
tasks.nextActionPrompt: Finish GPQA GPT-5.2 precache, then run GPQA GPT-5.2 ATTS eval (no-integrate, effort=high).

tasks.title: Write NeurIPS 2026 paper
tasks.description: Write the full paper: Introduction, Related Work, Methodology, Experiments (main results on 4 benchmarks + ablation studies + analysis), Limitations, Conclusion, Appendices (Implementation Details, AIME Results, Benchmark Details), NeurIPS Checklist.
tasks.completionNotes: 2026-03-27 revision pass: fixed all data errors (C1-C7, H1-H4, Q1-Q2, F1), added 6 missing related work papers, filled NeurIPS checklist, updated to NeurIPS 2026 style, added Algorithm 1 pseudocode, added cost accounting paragraph, toned down principles section, cleaned notation, added code release URL, added LLM Selection to all figures. Backbone ablation: GPT-5.2 effort=high 57% at $0.26/q vs Claude 56% at $1.90/q on HLE. GPQA GPT-5.2 precache in progress (28%).
tasks.nextActionPrompt: Remaining: (1) finish GPQA GPT-5.2 precache + eval to complete backbone ablation table with 2 benchmarks, (2) update backbone ablation section with GPQA results, (3) page count audit (currently 20 pages, main text must fit 9 pages), (4) final proofreading pass.

tasks.title: Final submission preparation
tasks.description: Final polish: citation verification, NeurIPS checklist completion, supplementary materials, code release preparation.
tasks.completionNotes: 2026-03-27: NeurIPS checklist filled (8 Yes, 2 No, 5 NA). NeurIPS 2026 style file installed. Code release URL added. Citation audit done (6 new refs verified via Google Scholar). Codex backend unified with Claude backend interface for GPT experiments.
tasks.nextActionPrompt: After backbone ablation experiments complete: final data audit pass on all numbers, compile and check page budget, prepare camera-ready PDF.
